message:
refactor(deps): decouple 8 crates from fcp-testkit and fcp-e2e, inline log validation

Break the deep dependency chain where many crates pulled in fcp-testkit
just for LogCapture, which in turn pulled in fcp-conformance. Each crate
now owns its own minimal log validation.

fcp-conformance:
- Add local LogCapture module (76 lines) using own schema validation
- Remove fcp-testkit dev-dep
- Update all internal imports (vecgen.rs, reqcheck/mod.rs, 3 test files)

fcp-core:
- Add tests/support.rs (136 lines) with inline LogCapture using
  include_str! for conformance schema files with v1/v2 detection
- Replace fcp-testkit dev-dep with jsonschema
- Update 6 test files to use support::LogCapture

fcp-testkit:
- Inline schema validation (~85 lines) via include_str! instead of
  depending on fcp-conformance
- Remove fcp-conformance dep, fcp-store optional dep, features section
- Delete run_once_object_store() method and cursor-store-object-store
  feature entirely

fcp-raptorq:
- Replace fcp-testkit dev-dep with jsonschema
- Inline validate_e2e_log_entry() in config.rs tests

fcp-store:
- Inline validate_e2e_log_entry() in repair.rs and symbol_store.rs
- Doc rebrand to "FCPS durable repair data"

fcp-host:
- Drop fcp-e2e dev-dep
- Inline simplified ConnectorProcessRunner (~83 lines) using
  fcp_async_core::process::Command
- Replace E2eLogger-based test with inline JSON construction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -44,7 +44,6 @@ path = "src/bin/reqcheck.rs"
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 pretty_assertions.workspace = true
-fcp-testkit = { path = "../fcp-testkit" }
 fcp-async-core = { path = "../fcp-async-core" }
 async-trait.workspace = true
 base64.workspace = true

@@ -36,7 +36,7 @@ zeroize = { version = "1.8", features = ["derive"] }
 [dev-dependencies]
 ciborium.workspace = true
 criterion.workspace = true
-fcp-testkit = { path = "../fcp-testkit" }
+jsonschema.workspace = true
 semver.workspace = true
 rand = "0.9"

@@ -28,7 +28,7 @@ fcp-tailscale = { path = "../fcp-tailscale" }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 chrono.workspace = true
-fcp-testkit = { path = "../fcp-testkit" }
+jsonschema.workspace = true
 rand.workspace = true
 rand_chacha = "0.3"
 serde_json.workspace = true

@@ -15,15 +15,14 @@ workspace = true
 # Core FCP types
 fcp-async-core = { path = "../fcp-async-core" }
 fcp-core = { path = "../fcp-core" }
-fcp-conformance = { path = "../fcp-conformance" }
 fcp-sdk = { path = "../fcp-sdk" }
-fcp-store = { path = "../fcp-store", optional = true }
 
 # Async runtime
 async-trait.workspace = true
 futures-util.workspace = true
 
 # Serialization
+jsonschema.workspace = true
 serde.workspace = true
 serde_json.workspace = true
 fcp-cbor = { path = "../fcp-cbor" }
@@ -55,7 +54,3 @@ regex.workspace = true
 sha2.workspace = true
 hmac.workspace = true
 hex.workspace = true
-
-[features]
-default = ["cursor-store-object-store"]
-cursor-store-object-store = ["fcp-sdk/cursor-store-object-store", "dep:fcp-store"]
